offer_price_per_share.consideration_type: mixed: cash election of $374.00 per share OR stock election of 3.8721 shares of Parent (Boston Scientific) common stock per share, with 73.26% maximum cash / 26.74% minimum stock proration

notes: Merger of Boston Scientific Corporation (Parent) acquiring Penumbra, Inc. (Company), dated January 14, 2026. Exchange ratio: 3.8721 Parent shares per Company share (stock election) or $374.00 cash per share (cash election), subject to proration (max 73.26% cash, min 26.74% stock). Termination fee provisions are in Section 8.03 which was not included in the provided document text. Deal equity value not stated in provided excerpt.
